mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get ready to experience banking like never before with our exclusive perks and privileges!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, standing in line at my favorite cafe, waiting for my usual double-shot, extra foamy, organic, ethically-sourced, sustainably-packaged latte. Suddenly, I felt a tap on my shoulder. I turned around to see a stranger, looking me dead in the eye and said, "Excuse me, but you cut in line." Cut in line? Me? Hot Josh? The nerve! Without missing a beat, I threw my arms up in dramatic fashion, causing a scene that could rival any Hollywood blockbuster. "How dare you accuse me of such a heinous act! Don't you know who I am? I am Hot Josh, CEO of Bank of Entitlement! I do not wait in line like mere peasants, I have places to be and lattes to drink! This is an outrage!" The entire cafe fell silent, all eyes on me as I continued my tirade, demanding an apology and a free latte for the inconvenience caused by this random act of audacity. The stranger, clearly taken aback by my unwavering entitlement, stammered out an apology and swiftly exited the cafe. As I sipped on my free latte, basking in the victory of asserting my entitlement, I couldn't help but feel a sense of satisfaction. After all, in a world full of commoners, a Hot Josh must always stand his ground.
